ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the game was played */,
  "daynum" INTEGER /* Day number of the season when the game was played */,
  "wteam" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "wscore" INTEGER /* Score of the winning team */,
  "lteam" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "lscore" INTEGER /* Score of the losing team */,
  "wloc" TEXT /* Location of the game (H for home, A for away) */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., stadium name) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the game */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_lteam FOREIGN KEY ("lteam") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_wteam FOREIGN KEY ("wteam") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship in that season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game to which the statistic belongs */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to which the statistic belongs */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player to which the statistic belongs */,
  "field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "three_pointers" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Player's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Player's last name */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position on the team */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Player's weight */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Coach's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Coach's last name */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "position" TEXT /* Coach's position (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Referee's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Referee's last name */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Referee's certification level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's username */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
